expectations.text: Installs Ruby via rbenv/asdf/mise — does NOT recommend system Ruby
expectations.evidence: Lines 6-8: 'brew install rbenv ruby-build && rbenv install 3.4.8'

expectations.text: Gemfile includes html-proofer in a :test group
Workflow gives actions/configure-pages step an id: pages
Workflow sets JEKYLL_ENV=production on the build step
Workflow has an htmlproofer step that runs against _site
htmlproofer step is scoped to internal links (--disable-external)
Uses current major versions: checkout@v4, setup-ruby@v1, configure-pages@v5, upload-pages-artifact@v3, deploy-pages@v4
